text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Grass Wonder has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Trainer, may I have a moment of your time?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking now that the Twinkle Series has
settled down, it might be a good time to fulfill
that promise.
choice_data_list:
You mean... go on that hot spring trip we won at
the raffle?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. If your schedule allows for it, would you be
willing to accompany me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I immediately agree to go. Chances to kick back
and blow off steam like this don't come up every
day.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Here we are, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This natural hot spring is said to relieve fatigue,
mental strain, muscle soreness, and stiff
shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've found that being knowledgeable about a
destination makes the trip more enjoyable.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In fact, hot springs have been a part of Japanese
culture since the times of the Kojiki and Nihon
Shoki.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It was all so interesting, so I read as much as I
could. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's as diligent as always, even on vacation. We
walk into the inn together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Phew... The water was wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The soothing heat seems to have washed away
every last trace of my exhaustion from racing. ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but feel it would be a waste for us to
return to our rooms now. Could we go for a walk?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... This place really does have a wonderful
view of the stars.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It sure is! ♪ The view from the outdoor bath was
so magnificent...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It made me want to see it again with you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The sky is like sand, a stardust of countless lights,
and somewhere out there... As though to return
my gaze, a star seems to shine at me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: A poem written by Shiki Masaoka.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Just like him, as I gaze up at the night sky, I feel
like there's a star shining for me too.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I think that star is you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Yes.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The steep path I travel has been fraught with
obstacles. The journey hasn't been easy.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The only reason I was able to make it through
with no regrets is because you have been there to
guide me.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Watching over me, lighting the way forward...
choice_data_list: That's because you are my star, Grass.
That's because you are my star, Grass.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like all the shining stars above us, there are
countless Umamusume aiming for the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there was only one light that caught my eye
and refused to let it go. It came from the
Umamusume named Grass Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So, we're each other's stars? Then we could
consider our meeting destiny.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Or is that an overblown thing to say?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
So long as we are there to light each other's
paths, neither of us will go astray.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My determination will drive me forward, as
always.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No matter how steep the climb, you and I will
ascend together, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Grass Wonder and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
